text: Ons is trots op jou.
translation: We're proud of you.

text: Tom sal nou trots op my wees.
translation: Tom will now be proud of me.

text: Ek is baie gelukkig in Georgië.
translation: I am very happy in Georgia.

text: Jou brief het my gelukkig gemaak.
translation: Your letter made me happy.

text: "Ek is baie gelukkig," het hy gesê.
translation: "I am very happy," he said.

text: Jy lyk nie te gelukkig om vir my te sien nie.
translation: You don't seem too happy to see me.

text: Ek is bly dat dit jou gelukkig maak.
translation: I'm glad it makes you happy.

text: Tom gaan nie gelukkig wees om jou te sien nie.
translation: Tom won't be happy to see you.

text: Ek wil nie hê jy moet dink dat ek nie gelukkig is met jou besluit nie.
translation: I don't want you to think that I'm not happy with your decision.

text: Tom moet kwaad wees.
translation: Tom must be angry.

text: Ek is kwaad vir beide van julle.
translation: I'm mad at both of you.

text: Ek dog jy sou kwaad vir my wees.
translation: I thought you might be mad at me.

text: Wat hy gesê het het ons kwaad gemaak.
translation: What he said made us angry.

text: Is jy kwaad vir my?
translation: Are you mad at me?

text: Jy is kwaad, is jy nie?
translation: You're angry, aren't you?

text: Dit het haar kwaad gemaak.
translation: That made her angry.

text: Jy is bang vir hom.
translation: You're afraid of him.

text: Julle is bang vir hom.
translation: You're afraid of him.

text: U is bang vir hom.
translation: You're afraid of him.

text: Hulle is bang vir hom.
translation: They're afraid of him.

text: Ek is nie meer bang nie.
translation: I'm not afraid any more.

text: Die meisie is bang vir honde.
translation: The girl is afraid of dogs.

text: Tom sal nie bang vir jou wees nie.
translation: Tom won't be afraid of you.

text: Ek is baie bang.
translation: I'm very scared.

text: Tom was baie bang.
translation: Tom was very scared.

text: Tom was baie bang gewees.
translation: Tom was very scared.

text: Die katte is bang vir water.
translation: The cats are afraid of water.

text: Voëls maak my bang.
translation: Birds scare me.

text: Moenie bang wees om foute te maak nie.
translation: Don't be afraid to make mistakes.

text: Paddas is bang vir slange.
translation: Frogs are afraid of snakes.

text: Tom is nie bang vir jou nie.
translation: Tom isn't afraid of you.

text: Tom moet vir Mary sê om nie bang te wees nie.
translation: Tom should tell Mary not to be frightened.

text: Tom was bang dat Mary gaan sterf.
translation: Tom was afraid that Mary was going to die.

text: Ek is nie so slim soos jy nie.
translation: I'm not as smart as you.

text: Tom is 'n slim kind.
translation: Tom is a smart kid.

text: Tom sou nie so dom wees nie.
translation: Tom wouldn't be that stupid.

text: Ek wil vir jou iets wys in my kantoor.
translation: I want to show you something in my office.

text: Wys my wat jy het.
translation: Show me what you've got.

text: Tom kan Mary wys.
translation: Tom can show Mary.

text: Dit was lekker om met haar te praat.
translation: It was nice to talk to her.

text: Die aartappel is 'n lekker groente.
translation: The potato is a delicious vegetable.

text: Die kos was lekker in Italië.
translation: The food was great in Italy.

text: Dit was lekker om met jou te gesels.
translation: It was nice chatting with you.

text: Hierdie vleis ruik sleg.
translation: This meat smells bad.

text: Dit lyk nie so sleg nie.
translation: It doesn't look so bad.

text: Jy was nie so sleg nie.
translation: You weren't that bad.

text: Jy is nie sleg met dit nie.
translation: You're not bad at this.

text: Die kos het nie so sleg geproe nie.
translation: The food didn't taste that bad.

text: My Fraans is sleg.
translation: My French is bad.

text: Dit was baie lelik.
translation: It was very ugly.

text: My ma het skoon lakens op my bed gesit.
translation: My mother put clean sheets on the bed.

text: Ek het skoon van haar vergeet.
translation: I forgot all about her.

text: Ek het skoon van hom vergeet.
translation: I forgot all about him.

text: Ek het skoon van hulle vergeet.
translation: I forgot all about them.

text: Tom het skoon van my vergeet.
translation: Tom forgot all about me.

text: Tom het skoon van hulle vergeet.
translation: Tom forgot all about them.

text: Tom het skoon van ons vergeet.
translation: Tom forgot all about us.

text: Ons het skoon van haar vergeet.
translation: We forgot all about her.

text: Ons het skoon van hom vergeet.
translation: We forgot all about him.

text: Ons het skoon van hulle vergeet.
translation: We forgot all about them.

text: Die yskas is vuil.
translation: The refrigerator is dirty.

text: Ek voel vuil, ek moet gaan stort.
translation: I feel dirty, I need a shower..

text: Die klip voel nat.
translation: The rock feels wet.

text: My kat is nat.
translation: My cat is wet.

text: Hoe oud is jy?
translation: How old are you?

text: "Hoe oud is jy?" "Ek is sestien."
translation: "How old are you?" "I'm sixteen."

text: Hoe oud skat u haar?
translation: How old do you think she is?

text: My ouers het my leer skaats toe ek drie jaar oud was.
translation: My parents taught me to skate when I was three years old.

text: Hoe oud is hierdie kasteel?
translation: How old is this castle?

text: Tom is nie baie oud nie.
translation: Tom isn't very old.

text: Hy is een-en-dertig jaar oud.
translation: He's thirty one years old.

text: My pen is nuut.
translation: My pen is new.

text: Jy kan nie ernstig wees nie.
translation: You can't be serious.

text: Om te deel is belangrik.
translation: Sharing is important.

text: Dis baie belangrik dat ek met Tom praat.
translation: It's very important that I talk to Tom.

text: Hoe belangrik is dit?
translation: How important is it?

text: Hoe belangrik is dit dat kinders grootword met hierdie taal?
translation: How important is it that children grow up with this language?

text: Dit is belangrik om baie boeke te lees.
translation: It's important to read a lot of books.

text: Dit is egter nie moontlik nie.
translation: This, however, is not possible.

text: Ek het nie gedink dat hierdie moontlik sou wees nie.
translation: I didn't think this would be possible.

text: Mary sal moontlik beter voel sodra sy iets te ete gekry het.
translation: Mary will probably feel better once she gets something to eat.

text: Almal het die reg om veilig te voel.
translation: Everyone has the right to feel safe.

text: As jy opstaan sal hy besig wees om te studeer.
translation: He will be studying when you get up.

text: Robert was so besig dat hy 'n uitnodiging om golf te speel van die hand moes wys.
translation: Robert was so busy he had to turn down an invitation to play golf.

text: Hy was besig om te praat.
translation: He was speaking.

text: Hy was besig om hard te snork.
translation: He was snoring loudly.

text: Tom en Mary is baie besig.
translation: Tom and Mary are very busy.

text: Ek is net besig om realisties te wees.
translation: I'm just being realistic.

text: Ek is nie besig om onredelik te wees nie.
translation: I'm not being unreasonable.

text: Ek was die hele nag besig om te dinkskrum.
translation: I was up all night brainstorming.

text: Tom sit by venster besig om 'n boek te lees.
translation: Tom sat by the window, reading a book.

text: My vader is besig.
translation: My father is busy.

text: Mamma is besig om te werk.
translation: Mom is busy working.

text: Dalk is hy besig.
translation: Maybe he's busy.

text: Tom was toe besig.
translation: Tom was busy then.

text: Ek is 'n vry man.
translation: I'm a free man.

text: Tom is vry om te gaan.
translation: Tom is free to go.

text: Tom is gereed om al jou vrae te beantwoord.
translation: Tom is ready to answer all your questions.

text: Het jy die boek wat ek nou die dag vir jou geleen het, klaar gelees?
translation: Have you finished reading the book I lent you the other day?

text: Ek maak my huiswerk klaar.
translation: I'm finishing my homework.

text: Laat my weet as dit klaar is.
translation: Let me know when it's done.

text: Ons sal dit later klaar maak.
translation: We'll finish this later.

text: Hierdie boks is leeg.
translation: This box is empty.

text: Johan se boeke is te swaar om op een slag te dra.
translation: Johan's books are too heavy to carry at once.

text: Die klip is swaar.
translation: The stone is heavy.

text: Hierdie handdoek is dik.
translation: This towel is thick.

text: Die mure is dik.
translation: The walls are thick.

text: Grawe 'n diep gat.
translation: Dig a deep hole.

text: Ek het oor haar rond gevra.
translation: I asked around about her.

text: Ek het oor hom rond gevra.
translation: I asked around about him.

text: Ek het oor hulle rond gevra.
translation: I asked around about them.

text: Ek het my in 'n hotel bespreek en reguit gaan slaap.
translation: I checked into a hotel and went right to sleep.

text: Die kos het glad nie so sleg geproe nie.
translation: The food didn't taste all that bad.

text: Tom gaan glad nie verskyn nie.
translation: Tom won't be showing up at all.

text: Hy het glad nie met my gepraat nie.
translation: He didn't speak to me at all.

text: Jy is 'n helder seuntjie.
translation: You're a bright boy.

text: Tom is 'n helder seuntjie.
translation: Tom's a bright boy.

text: Ons sal vermoedelik voor donker daar aankom.
translation: We are likely to get there before dark.

text: Ek het opgestaan toe dit nog donker was.
translation: I got up while it was still dark.

text: Die kamer was donker.
translation: The room was dark.

text: Verkies jy rooi of wit wyn?
translation: Do you prefer red or white wine?

text: Jou bloed is rooi.
translation: Your blood is red.

text: My gunstelling kleur is rooi.
translation: My favourite colour is red.

text: Ek wil 'n rooi kar hê.
translation: I want a red car.

text: Ek het nog nooit 'n rooi yskas gesien nie.
translation: I have never seen a red refrigerator.

text: Ek wil 'n blou koek hê.
translation: I want a blue cake.

text: Die lug is blou, die see is ook blou. Die lug en die see is blou.
translation: The sky is blue, the sea is also blue. The sky and the sea are blue.

text: Sy het groot blou oë.
translation: She has large blue eyes.

text: Die meisie in die blou jas is my dogter.
translation: The girl in the blue coat is my daughter.

text: Agter die wolke is die lug altyd blou.
translation: Behind the clouds, the sky is always blue.

text: Ek hou van die blou rok met die wit kraag. Het jy dit in my grootte?
translation: I like the blue dress with the white collar. Do you have it in my size?

text: Die bome is groen.
translation: The trees are green.

text: Jy het 'n groen boek.
translation: You have a green book.

text: Ek hou van die kleur geel.
translation: I like the colour yellow.

text: Tom het sy hare donker bruin gekleur.
translation: Tom dyed his hair dark brown.

text: Die mure was 'n ligte bruin geverf.
translation: The walls were painted light brown.

text: Die blare is bruin.
translation: The leaves are brown.

text: Tom gaan nie ons môre help nie.
translation: Tom won't be helping us tomorrow.

text: Tom het 'n groot dag môre.
translation: Tom has a big day tomorrow.

text: Hy sal môre terugkeer.
translation: He'll be coming back tomorrow.

text: Jy het 'n besige dag môre.
translation: You've got a busy day tomorrow.

text: Ek het jou gister gesien.
translation: I saw you yesterday.

text: Ek het my vriende gister gesien.
translation: I saw my friends yesterday.

text: Dit was gister koud.
translation: It was cold yesterday.

text: Ons het gister ons tiende huweliksherdenking gevier.
translation: We celebrated our tenth wedding anniversary yesterday.

text: Wat het jy gister gemaak?
translation: What did you do yesterday?

text: My pa het gister drie vis gevang.
translation: My father caught three fish yesterday.

text: Het jy gister na skool reguit huis toe gegaan?
translation: Did you go straight home after school yesterday?

text: Hy het gister John laat inkom.
translation: He allowed John to enter yesterday.

text: Ek het gister gekom.
translation: I came yesterday.

text: Gister hierdie tyd was ons by die bioskoop.
translation: Yesterday at this time, we were at the movie theater.

text: Tom het gister televisie gekyk.
translation: Tom watched television yesterday.

text: Was jy gister besig?
translation: Were you busy yesterday?

text: Was jy besig gister?
translation: Were you busy yesterday?

text: Ek het gister hard gewerk.
translation: I worked hard yesterday.

text: Hy het gister tuisgebly.
translation: He stayed home yesterday.

text: Ek voel nie lus om vandag Engels te studeer nie.
translation: I don't feel like studying English today.

text: Sy't vandag sy middagete gebring.
translation: She brought his lunch today.

text: Ek wil vandag gaan swem, maar die water is net te vuil vir 'n mens.
translation: I want to go swimming today, but the water is just too dirty for a person.

text: Dit is winderig vandag.
translation: It is windy today.

text: Tom gaan nie vandag by die skool wees nie.
translation: Tom won't be at school today.

text: Ek is verbaas dat Tom nie vandag besig is nie.
translation: I'm surprised Tom isn't busy today.

text: Tom gaan nie enige aflewerings vandag maak nie.
translation: Tom won't be making any deliveries today.

text: Jy sal nie Tom vandag kan sien nie.
translation: You won't be able to see Tom today.

text: Jy gaan nie glo wie vandag verby gekom het nie.
translation: You won't believe who came by today.

text: Ek wil nie vandag werk nie.
translation: I don't want to work today.

text: Wat is vandag se datum?
translation: What's today's date?

text: Vandag reën dit weer.
translation: Today it rains again.

text: Wat maak jy vandag?
translation: What are you doing today?

text: Het jy vanaand televisie gekyk?
translation: Did you watch TV tonight?

text: Ek sal nie vanaand kan slaap nie.
translation: I won't be able to sleep tonight.

text: Tom sal nie vanaand bel nie.
translation: Tom won't call this evening.

text: Die bakleiery het 'n week lank geduur.
translation: The fighting lasted one week.

text: Tom gaan nie vir 'n week terug wees nie.
translation: Tom won't be back for a week.

text: Die vullisverwyderaar kom drie keer per week.
translation: The garbage collector comes three times a week.

text: Volgende week is het Halloween.
translation: Halloween is next week.

text: Ek gaan nie hier volgende maand wees nie.
translation: I won't be here next month.

text: Tom gaan nie volgende maand hier wees nie.
translation: Tom won't be here next month.

text: Sal jy Tom volgende maand sien?
translation: Will you see Tom next month?

text: Hy het vir 'n maand gegaan.
translation: He left for a month.

text: Hy het vir 'n maand verlaat.
translation: He left for a month.

text: Die winkel maak om elf uur toe.
translation: The store closes at eleven.

text: Ek sal terug wees in 'n uur.
translation: I'll be back in an hour.

text: Is dit goedkoper om na 9 uur te bel?
translation: Is it cheaper to call after 9:00?

text: Hoogwater is vanmiddag om 3 uur.
translation: High tide is at 3 p.m. today.

text: Ek het net 'n minuut.
translation: I've only got a minute.

text: Kan ek met jou praat vir 'n sekonde?
translation: Could I talk to you alone for a second?

text: Die oomblik wat ek haar gesien het, het ek haar herken.
translation: I recognized her the moment I saw her.

text: Vir 'n oomblik het ek vergeet wat haar naam was.
translation: For a moment I forgot what her name was.

text: Het u 'n oomblik?
translation: Have you got a moment?

text: Hang aan vir 'n oomblik.
translation: Hang on a moment.

text: Op die oomblik soek ek werk.
translation: At the moment I am looking for a job.

text: Ek gaan volgende Sondag trou.
translation: I'm getting married next Sunday.

text: Ek is al besig vanaf laas sondag.
translation: I have been busy since last Sunday.

text: Vandag is dit Maandag.
translation: Today is Monday.

text: Ek gaan nie gereed wees om dit te doen tot Maandag nie.
translation: I won't be ready to do that until Monday.

text: Hulle het hulle werk op Maandag verloor.
translation: They lost their jobs on Monday.

text: Volgende Donderdag is 'n vakansiedag.
translation: Next Thursday is a holiday.

text: Saterdag is my pa oop.
translation: Saturday is when my father is free.

text: Mnr. Brown het op 15 Mei na Engeland vertrek.
translation: Mr Brown left for England on May 15.

text: Die nasionale vlag van Brasilië is op 11 Mei 1992 amptelik in gebruik geneem.
translation: The Brazilian national flag officially came into use on May 11, 1992.

text: Ek hou baie van somer.
translation: I love summer.

text: Ons het hierdie herfs baie tifone gehad.
translation: We have had lots of typhoons this fall.

text: Ons gaan hierdie winter min sneeu hê.
translation: We will have little snow this winter.

text: Daar is baie vure in die winter.
translation: There are a lot of fires in the winter.

text: Gozo is suid van Sisilië.
translation: Gozo is south of Sicily.

text: Om patrioties te wees is nie fascisties, Nazi of vêr regs nie, dit is om jou land lief te hê.
translation: Being a patriot isn’t being a fascist, nor a Nazi, nor a right-winger, it’s loving your country.

text: Ek is lief daarvoor om langs die rivier to loop.
translation: I love walking along the river.

text: Ek wens jy was naby aan my.
translation: I wish you were close to me.

text: Ons bly naby aan die skool.
translation: We live close to the school.

text: Ons gaan bivouac naby die dam.
translation: We'll bivouac near the lake.

text: Ons gaan kamp maak naby die dam.
translation: We'll make camp near the lake.

text: Hy het 'n groot restaurant naby die see.
translation: He has a large restaurant close to the ocean.

text: Hulle het die agtermiddag spandeer om die staproete hier naby te stap.
translation: They spent the afternoon hiking on a nearby trail.

text: Ons het oral gekyk.
translation: We've looked everywhere.

text: Ek't nêrens om vanaand te slaap nie.
translation: I've nowhere to sleep tonight.

text: Jy gaan nêrens veilig wees nie.
translation: You won't be safe anywhere.

text: Tom het nêrens meer om te gaan.
translation: Tom has nowhere left to go.

text: Ek wil weet daar buite aan gaan.
translation: I want to know what's going on out here.

text: Dit is buite die kwessie.
translation: That's out of the question.

text: Ek het buite die huis gegaan en Tom met sy hondjie Fido gesien.
translation: I went out of the house and saw Tom with his little dog Fido.

text: Hy's nie altyd Sondae tuis nie.
translation: He's not always at home on Sundays.

text: Is jou ma tuis?
translation: Is your mum at home?

text: Ek gaan nie tuis vir 'n week wees nie.
translation: I won't be home for a week.

text: Tom het laat tuis gekom.
translation: Tom got home late.

text: Jy sal nie dit kan doen sonder my nie.
translation: You won't be able to do that without me.

text: Hy eet sonder ophou.
translation: He eats non-stop.

text: Volgens jou wat moet daaroor gedoen word?
translation: What do you think should be done about it?

text: Volgens my is jy verkeerd.
translation: In my opinion, you're wrong.

text: Ons het hom volgens die reëls bestraf.
translation: We punished him according to the rules.

text: Dit reën baie tydens die reënseisoen.
translation: It rains a lot during the rainy season.

text: Die voëls sing rondom die parkie.
translation: In the park birds are singing all around.

text: Wees hoflik teenoor jou ouers.
translation: Be polite to your parents.

text: My hond Wolfgang slaap altyd langs my op 'n bank terwyl ek besig is met die rekenaar.
translation: My dog Wolfgang always sleeps beside me on the bench while I'm working at the computer.

text: Bly in jou kamer totdat jou pa terug kom!
translation: Stay in your room until your father gets back!

text: Aangesien jy hier is, kan ons netsowel begin.
translation: Since you're here, we might as well begin.

text: Ek is besig om te bespaar sodat ek Australië toe kan gaan.
translation: I'm saving up so that I can go to Australia.

text: Ek gaan die wyn oopmaak sodat dit kan asemhaal.
translation: I'm going to open the wine and let it breathe.

text: Jy kan die verwarmer aanskakel indien jy koud kry.
translation: You can turn on the heater if you're cold.

text: Waarom wil jy hierdie boek koop?
translation: Why do you want to buy this book?

text: Waarom het hy nie gekom nie?
translation: Why didn't he come?

text: Wat is die ware rede waarom jy dit nie wil doen nie?
translation: What's the real reason you don't want to do this?

text: Waarom help jy my nie om hengel wurms te vang nie?
translation: Why don't you help me find some fishing worms?

text: Waarom gee jy vir haar om?
translation: Why do you care about her?

text: Waarom gee jy vir hom om?
translation: Why do you care about him?

text: Waarom gee jy vir hulle om?
translation: Why do you care about them?

text: Waarom is Tom vroeg?
translation: Why is Tom early?

text: Waarom is jy vroeg?
translation: Why are you early?

text: Ek probeer uitvind waarom ons dit moet doen.
translation: I'm trying to find out why we need to do that.

text: Hoekom het jy Japan toe gekom?
translation: Why did you come to Japan?

text: Hoekom het jy jou werk op die plaas gelos?
translation: Why did you leave your job on the farm?

text: Hoekom dink jy het hy so gesê?
translation: Why do you think he said so?

text: Hoekom neem almal nie 'n sitplek nie?
translation: Why don't you all just take a seat?

text: Hoekom sou jy wou iets soos dit doen?
translation: Why would you want to do something like that?

text: Hoekom dra jy nie 'n rok nie?
translation: Why don't you wear a dress?

text: Hoekom sê jy nie net vir ons wat op joy gedagtes is nie?
translation: Why don't you just tell us what's on your mind?

text: Is hierdie die rede hoekom jy nie wil saam kom nie?
translation: Is this the reason you didn't want to come with me?

text: Wil jy nie weet hoekom ek dit nie gedoen het nie?
translation: Don't you want to know why I didn't do that?

text: Dis hoekom ek hier is.
translation: That's why I'm here.

text: Dit is nie hoekom ek hier is nie.
translation: That is not why I am here.

text: Hoekom moet ek lieg?
translation: Why should I lie?

text: Hoekom sal ek lieg?
translation: Why would I lie?

text: Hoekom praat jy nie met my daaroor nie?
translation: Why don't you talk to me about it?

text: Hoekom moet Tom dit doen?
translation: Why does Tom have to do that?

text: Hoekom wil jy hê dat ons dit moet hê?
translation: Why do you want us to have it?

text: Hoekom moet ek oor hulle omgee?

text: Hoekom probeer jy nie tennis nie?
translation: Why don't you give tennis a try?

text: Hoekom sluit jy nie by ons aan vir aandete vanaand nie?
translation: Why don't you join us for dinner tonight?

text: Hoekom het jy na hulle geluister?
translation: Why did you listen to them?

text: Hoekom het jy drie motors?
translation: Why do you have three cars?

text: Hoekom doen beren winterslaap?
translation: Why do bears hibernate?

text: Hoekom hiberneer mense nie?
translation: Why don't people hibernate?

text: Hoekom het jy dit gister nie gedoen nie?
translation: Why didn't you do that yesterday?

text: Hoekom eet jy nie?
translation: Why aren't you eating?

text: Hoekom is jy kwaad?
translation: Why are you angry?

text: Hoekom het jy vir Tom uitgelok?
translation: Why did you provoke Tom?

text: Hoekom eet honde gras?
translation: Why do dogs eat grass?

text: Hoekom stop jy? Jy het ryvoorrang.
translation: Why are you still stopped? You have the right of way.

text: Ons sal jou roep wanneer jou tafel gereed is.
translation: We'll call you when your table is ready.

text: Wanneer en waar kan ons ontmoet?
translation: What time and where could we meet?

text: Wanneer het jy laas vir jou vrou blomme aangebied?
translation: When was the last time you offered flowers to your wife?

text: Wanneer het jy laas gebid?
translation: When was the last time you prayed?

text: Wanneer het jy laas gelag?
translation: When was the last time you laughed?

text: Wanneer het jy laas hierdie masjien aangeskakel?
translation: When was the last time you switched on this machine?

text: Wanneer het jy laas gestem?
translation: When was the last time you voted?

text: Wanneer het jy laas gesing?
translation: When was the last time you sang?

text: Wanneer het jy laas jou vrou gesoen?
translation: When was the last time you kissed your wife?

text: Wanneer het jy laas gedans?
translation: When was the last time you danced?

text: Wanneer is hierdie kerk gebou?
translation: When was this church built?

text: Wanneer eet Tom ontbyt?

text: Ek sal jou sê wanneer ek terug is.

text: Ek het by die herehuis aangekom stroom van sweet.

text: Jy ruim hier op, Maak gou!

text: Gaan staan in die tou, soos almal!

translation: Why cross the line like that?

text: Maar daardie reuk trap oor die tou.
translation: But that smell crosses the line.

translation: I got him a map that shows all the rivers in France.

text: Herr von Bismarck! Het u vir my gewag?

text: Hy het maande gewag vir Martin
translation: He waited for Martin every day for months

text: Daardie wond... sy kop, het jy gesien?
translation: That wound...his head... - You saw it?

text: Dis net 'n ligte wond!

text: Ek het nooit gedink daar's 'n vulkaan onder daardie ys nie

text: Haal die wol van jou poot af.

text: Sy hou op om die poot te haat, en reik haar hand uit
translation: She stops hating it. Its constancy touches her and she gives it her hand

text: Ek en Martin is darem verwant

text: Dis sleg dat ek nou moet weggaan!
translation: Damn it, I must leave!

text: Die rotte maak ons kanale skoon
translation: The rats clean our canals.

text: Sestig kinders dood, soos rotte vasgekeer
translation: Sixty children killed, trapped like rats.

text: Totsiens, groet solank die Rotte!
translation: My time is up. I kiss your hand, loveliest of ladies. I have to go

text: Dis 'n sekere chemie, in elk geval
translation: It's a certain chemistry, anyway.

text: "Die Chemie van Liefde" is voltooi!
translation: Congratulations. Thank you. Thank you, yeah.

text: "Die Chemie van die Liefde"
translation: Is that why you did this?

text: Soos ek gedink het, bas, regs
translation: Like I thought, Bass, right.

text: Of brom iets in bas
translation: Whistle, too!

text: Hulle was soos gesmelte lood op 'n oop wond gegooi
translation: They were like molten lead poured on an open wound.

text: My arm was soos lood om dit te verhoog om haar te seën.
translation: My arm was like lead in raising it to bless her.

text: Jy het dit soos lood gemaak, die punt sleep, en my hande is kloue!
translation: You made it leaden. The train drags and my hands are claws!

text: Sus, glo jy ook aan spoke?
translation: Sis, you believe in ghosts, too?

text: Nee, dis haar tweeling sus
translation: - No. This is the twin.

text: So skyf my sus Ida.
translation: There you're never bored!

text: Ek kan nie jou misdade vergewe nie...
translation: I can't absolve your crimes...

text: Beken jy skuld aan jou misdade?
translation: Do you admit your crimes?

text: Dis dan nou die hele lys van my misdade
translation: That's the extent of my crimes.

text: Dit lyk asof daar alreeds een van hulle doodgeskiet is.
translation: It seems they've already shot and killed one of them.

text: Dis nou 'n manier on vlugte te reël!
translation: That's a hell of a way to run an airline.

text: Dit was meer vlugte dan 'n nuwe begin.
translation: More like running away than a fresh start.

text: Vlugte is veronderstel om laat te wees, nie vroeg nie!
translation: Planes are supposed to be late, not early.

text: Die winkel maak om elf uur toe.
translation: The store closes at eleven.

text: Daar is 'n spioen aan boord!
translation: There's a spy on board.

text: Is die luitenant nie dalk 'n spioen nie?
translation: Isn't the lieutenant a spy either?

text: - Is jy 'n Amerikaanse spioen? - Nee!
translation: - Sind Sie ein amerikanischer Spion?

text: In sy sfeer is ingesluit die totale morele wêreld
translation: History speaks to man incessantly...

text: Jou suster maak tans 'n tuitmond soos 'n eend se snawel.
translation: Currently your sister's lip is pouting like a duck's bill.

text: - Vir 'n film 'n Film vir die groot skerm,
translation: - For a movie or TV? - A movie. A movie, for the big screen.

text: Ons is al gewoond aan dood op die skerm
translation: We've got used to death on the screen.

text: Goeie skerm, my heer!
translation: - Well parried, sir!

text: Sestig kinders dood, soos rotte vasgekeer
translation: Sixty children killed, trapped like rats.

text: Nee, ek het sestig
translation: -No I have sixty

text: Komete stel hul koers nie by, generaal.
translation: Comets don't make course corrections, general.

text: Julle is nie hier vir jul plesier nie.
translation: Come on! Travel is no pleasure for them.

text: Wat gaan jul daar doen?
translation: What are you doing there?

text: Is julle bereid om jul lewe te gee vir die Vaderland?
translation: Are you prepared to die for the fatherland?

text: Hy werp homself voor haar voete, volg haar elke stap
translation: No.

text: Miskien is dit sy omgewing wat 'n skadu werp op sy wetenskaplikheid
translation: It's rather the surroundings that cast a shadow on his scientific merit.

text: Ons is 'n duisend, kom ons baklei!
translation: We're 1,000! Let's gather and fight!

text: En jare lank het ons baklei teen mekaar
translation: And for years we fought against one another.

text: Jou ouers het teen hom baklei.
translation: Your parents fought against him.

text: Ek geraak in die harde skyf.
translation: I will access this hard drive.

text: So skyf my sus Ida.
translation: There you're never bored!

text: Maar jy het op jou ouers se grafte gesweer!
translation: They're already dead.

text: Ek wil hulle grafte besoek.
translation: I want to visit their graves.

text: Hulle het nie grafte nie.
translation: They have no graves.

text: Ek bring u na u kamer. Pote af, helleveeg!
translation: - I'll take that TV set for you.

text: Dis 'n hond se vel, haas se pote, en donkie-ore!
translation: It has a dog's fur, hare's feet and donkey's ears!

text: Ek sal jou my nuutste plan wys
translation: I'll show you my latest invention.

text: - U het haar haar nuutste boek, sien ek
translation: There's no more. I'm empty.

text: En die nuutste gebeure bewys dit
translation: And the recent events prove that.

text: Julle vrouens sal nie sonder my klaarkom nie
translation: You women, you won't manage without me.

text: Hy het nie by vrouens gaan kuier nie!
translation: He didn't go to see hookers!

text: Maar ek kan nie met hom praat oor vrouens nie,
translation: All the same, I can't talk to him about women.

text: Ek nooi al my klante en vriende
translation: I'm inviting all my clients and friends.

text: met 'n klomp klante, en baie vriende
translation: I had a good clientele. Friends.

text: Die klante eet hier en ook daar
translation: The customers eat here and there.

text: Ek lig my glas vir die demokrasie!
translation: I raise my glass to democracy.

text: Nou in die demokrasie, doen hulle wat hulle wil - hulle staan op
translation: Now they do what they want. They stand.

text: Ek het nie baie verbeelding nie
translation: - I've not got much imagination.

text: Nee, dis net my verbeelding
translation: It's just the muse.

text: Jou mededinger is jou verbeelding!
translation: Your rival is imaginary!

text: Toe gaan hulle oor die kloof,
translation: Then we went over the Törl.

text: In hierdie kloof is die staf van die Romeense Divisie
translation: In this ravine is the staff of the Rumanian Division.

text: Die verslane Romeense divisie het in 'n kloof noodkwartiere ingerig
translation: The defeated Rumanian Div. Set up temporary quarters in a ravine.

text: Dink net: een tiende graad!
translation: A tenth of a degree, think of it!

text: Hierdie is jou tiende besoek, kyk hoe lastig dit is
translation: This is your tenth visit, see what trouble this is.

text: Ons het gister ons tiende huweliksherdenking gevier.
translation: We celebrated our tenth wedding anniversary yesterday.

text: Kom jy vir ontbyt? Ja, ek kom
translation: - Are you coming for breakfast?

text: Verskoon ons. Dankie vir die heerlike ontbyt!
translation: Joe and Klara are now banned from Berlin.

text: Tom het ontbyt geëet op sy eie.
translation: Tom ate breakfast by himself.

text: Nou hardloop tot julle longe bars!
translation: Now run off, till your lungs burst.

text: Sy het goeie longe
translation: She has fine lungs.

text: Nou bied ons Zampano aan, die man met longe van staal.
translation: Now we present Zampano, the man with lungs of steel.

text: Die pen is ligter as die pik
translation: The pen is lighter than the pickaxe.

text: Twee jaar gelede was jou hare korter, of ligter
translation: Two years ago, your hair was shorter. Or lighter.

text: Wanneer die pyn ligter raak het ek nog my gedagtes.
translation: When the pain eases, I have my thoughts.

text: Haai raai, ek kan gladnie onthou nie
translation: - No, just think, I can't remember.

text: Ek raai u af om te gaan
translation: I advise you off.

text: Ek kon raai dis jy, jou slang!
translation: Imight've known it was you, you snake!

text: Hy gedra hom soos 'n genie, die 4de dimensie en goed is alles vals.
translation: Acting like a genius, that 4th dimension stuff is all fake.

text: Luit-Kol, die 51e korps het arriveer!
translation: Lieut.-Col. of the Fifty First Army Corps arriving!

text: Of gun jy hulle dit nie om te trou voordat ... die baba arriveer?
translation: Or do you resent them getting married before the child arrives ?

text: Die Eersteminister het pas arriveer
translation: - Bismarck is here? - He has not requested an appointment.

text: Hierdie tuine is lekker groot en mooi
translation: These gardens are nice and big.

text: Graaf Ferraud het die tuine self uitgelê
translation: Count Ferraud designed the gardens himself.

text: In Italië is daar baie huise met groot tuine.
translation: In Italy, there are many houses with large gardens.

text: Eindelik het jy tot jou sinne gekom Jammer
translation: Madame Sand, you insult our hosts.

text: Kom tot u sinne meester!
translation: Come to your senses... Master!

text: Kom tot jou sinne, metropoliet!
translation: Come to your senses... Metropolitan!

text: - Jy maatskappy betaal sy reis en hotel en het hom 10.000 dollar baar geld.
translation: Your company paid for his hotel and airfare, gave him $10,000 in cash.

text: – Nuwe gesigte, nuwe klanke...
translation: -New faces, new sounds...

text: almal maak pad voor vir my helder die klanke van my sang!
translation: All the people make way for me listening reverently to my song

text: Klanke van die Heimat,
translation: Songs of my homeland, you waken my longing bringing tears to my eyes!

text: Met die korrekte gebruik is sommige gifstowwe voordelig.
translation: Properly used, certain poisons will prove beneficial.

text: Waar is al jou prente, Victor?
translation: - Where are your pictures, Victor?

text: het u nog prente gebring?
translation: Did you bring anymore pictures?

text: Die kliniek het prente nodig gehad vir die rekonstruksie
translation: The clinic needed pictures for the reconstruction.

text: jy het donker ringe om jou oë
translation: You've dark rings round your eyes.

text: Mooi naam, mooi ringe, mooi hande
translation: Pretty name. You have nice rings, pretty hands

text: Swaai in, draai die seile!
translation: Come about. Brace the sails.

text: Gee dit 'n swaai.
translation: Give it a wave.

text: Swaai u arm, heer.
translation: Wave your arm, Sire.

text: Mens kan sien; doen jy dit saans?
translation: - It shows. - You do them at night?

text: Met haar het ek soggens en saans gepraat
translation: To her I turned morning and evening.

text: Dit is saans nog mooier
translation: It's prettier still by night.

text: As hy na 12 ure nog leef, is sy organe onbeskadig
translation: If he's still alive after 12 hours his organs must be intact

text: Selfs 'n sjirurg sal sy organe beskadig, as hy die koeël wil uithaal
translation: Even a surgeon would damage his organs extracting the bullet

text: Het jy nie my boodskappe gekry nie?
translation: You didn't get my message?

translation: Four texts, Teach. That's a relationship!

translation: Friends ask me to record their messages.

text: Ek kan nie asemhaal nie, die pels!
translation: I can't breathe. The fur!

translation: How long can a fur like this last?

text: Fuhrmann, neem my pels
translation: Fuhrmann, take my fur coat.

text: Jy is wetlik verplig om mnr Matter die spyskaart te wys
translation: You're legally bound to show Mr. Matter the menu.

text: Ons dateer terug na die Tweede Kruistog
translation: We date back to the Second Crusade.

text: Familie gaan terug tot die Tweede Kruistog Hier is die familie se kasteel
translation: Goes back to the Second Crusade. Here's the family castle.

text: Miskien moet ons 'n spesialis raadpleeg
translation: Maybe we should consult a specialist.

translation: But you should really see a doctor if you can't sleep.

text: Ek het 10 kg geplant, so met 3 ton mielies kan ons ontspan
translation: I planted 10 kilos, so, with 3 tons of corn, we can relax.

translation: We're doing a food project about maize.

text: dalk 'n metafoor is vir iets anders?
translation: The whole world is the metaphor for something else?

text: Jy het jou eie metafoor gemaak
translation: - You've invented a metaphor.

text: - Miskien is die Bose maar net 'n metafoor
translation: -Maybe evil is just a metaphor.

text: Bismarck, dit is tog 'n fantasie!
translation: Bismarck, this is a pipe dream!

text: Politiek is nie fantasie nie!
translation: Politics isn't the stuff of fantasy.

text: Wells spioneerde nie, hy gespeel fantasie sokker.
translation: Wells wasn't spying, he was playing fantasy football.
